description: This file is a JavaScript module for managing DOM element instances in Bootstrap. It provides functions to set, get, and remove instances associated with DOM elements, using a Map to store the associations.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Associates an instance with a DOM element and a key, ensuring only one instance per element per key.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the instance associated with a DOM element and key, or null if none exists.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the association of an instance with a DOM element and key, cleaning up references if no instances remain for that element.
